'''ngamozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ignavia|ignavia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-m-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ignavia|ignavia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngamozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæmezheth|ngæmezheth]] || [[word:ngæmezhej|ngæmezhej]] || [[word:ngæmezhesh|ngæmezhesh]] || [[word:ngæmezhe|ngæmezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngamomozhoth|ngamomozhoth]] || [[word:ngamomozhoj|ngamomozhoj]] || [[word:ngamomozhosh|ngamomozhosh]] || [[word:ngamomozho|ngamomozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngamozhoth|ngamozhoth]] || [[word:ngamozhoj|ngamozhoj]] || [[word:ngamozhosh|ngamozhosh]] || [[word:ngamozho|ngamozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngamofzhofth|ngamofzhofth]] || [[word:ngamofzhofj|ngamofzhofj]] || [[word:ngamofzhofsh|ngamofzhofsh]] || [[word:ngamofzhof|ngamofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngamozhotho|ngamozhotho]] || [[word:ngamozhojo|ngamozhojo]] || [[word:ngamozhosho|ngamozhosho]] || [[word:ngamozhoko|ngamozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngamozhoth|ngamozhoth]] || [[word:ngamozhoj|ngamozhoj]] || [[word:ngamozhosh|ngamozhosh]] || [[word:ngamozho|ngamozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngamozhothol|ngamozhothol]] || [[word:ngamozhojol|ngamozhojol]] || [[word:ngamozhoshol|ngamozhoshol]] || [[word:ngamozhokol|ngamozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngamozhoothotho|ngamozhoothotho]] || [[word:ngamozhoojojo|ngamozhoojojo]] || [[word:ngamozhooshosho|ngamozhooshosho]] || [[word:ngamozhooko|ngamozhooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngamozhothon|ngamozhothon]] || [[word:ngamozhojon|ngamozhojon]] || [[word:ngamozhoshon|ngamozhoshon]] || [[word:ngamozhokon|ngamozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngamozhothooro|ngamozhothooro]] || [[word:ngamozhojooro|ngamozhojooro]] || [[word:ngamozhoshooro|ngamozhoshooro]] || [[word:ngamozhokooro|ngamozhokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
